title: Stairs Expansion
description: Stairs Expansion adds more stairs to the game.
body:
What's this mod? Ever wanted to expand your building options in Minecraft? Stairs Expansion is here to enrich your creativity! This mod introduces a variety of new stair variants that allow you to decorate your base and world in unique ways. Whether you're looking to craft detailed pathways, intricate roofs, or stylish furniture pieces, Stairs Expansion provides the perfect blocks to bring your architectural dreams to life.

Enhance your Minecraft experience with an assortment of beautifully crafted slabs that seamlessly integrate with the game's aesthetic. Each stair variant offers endless possibilities for customizing your builds. Discover new ways to express your style and transform your Minecraft world with Stairs Expansion today!
